title: DonutSMP Bal Checker By ALATIC
description: Bal Checker By ALATIC is a client-side Fabric mod for Donut SMP that displays players’ money balances directly above their usernames in-game. Instantly see how rich nearby players are without opening commands.
body:
**💰 Bal Checker By ALATIC**

Bal Checker By ALATIC is a lightweight client-side mod for Donut SMP that displays players’ money balances directly above their usernames in-game.

Balances are fetched using the official Donut SMP API, so the mod never runs commands or sends anything in chat.

Once enabled, nearby players will have their balance shown above their IGN just like a natural extension of the vanilla nametag.

**⚡ Features**

• Displays player balances above their username in-game
• Uses the Donut SMP API – no /bal commands required
• Clean nametag-style rendering that stays perfectly attached to players
• Automatic balance color tiers
• Simple configuration menu
• Opens config with H keybind
• Fully client-side

**🎨 Automatic Balance Colors**

Balances are automatically colored based on their value:

Red → 1B+

Blue → 1M+

Green → Under 1M


**⚙️ Setup**

Install the mod

Join Donut SMP

Press H to open the settings

Enter your Donut SMP API key

You can generate your API key in-game using:

/api

After adding your key, balances will automatically appear above nearby players.

**🔒 Donut SMP Only**

This mod is designed specifically for Donut SMP and will automatically disable itself on other servers.

**📦 Requirements**

Minecraft: 1.21.x

Loader: Fabric

Client-side mod

Cloth Config API
